start.text: You find yourself at the entrance of the Enchanted Forest, where the trees whisper ancient secrets.
start.image_prompt: An epic fantasy scene of an enchanted forest entrance with towering ancient trees whose branches twist into elaborate patterns, bioluminescent flora illuminating the path, ethereal mist, highly detailed, ultra-realistic, 8k resolution, in the style of Greg Rutkowski and Alphonse Mucha, cinematic lighting

deep_forest.text: As you venture deeper, the forest comes alive with magical creatures. A mystical stag with antlers adorned by glowing crystals appears.
deep_forest.image_prompt: A majestic mystical stag with crystalline antlers emitting a soft glow, surrounded by enchanted forest creatures, intricate details, photorealistic, 8k, dramatic backlighting, by artgerm and wlop

npc.name: Mystical Stag
npc.dialogue: Welcome, traveler. To proceed, you must prove your wisdom.

riddle_challenge.text: The stag asks, 'I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have nobody, but I come alive with the wind. What am I?'
riddle_challenge.image_prompt: An abstract representation of a riddle in the enchanted forest, with swirling winds forming whispering voices, high detail, fantasy art, 8k, mystical atmosphere

riddle_solved.text: You answer correctly. The stag nods and grants you a magical artifact.
riddle_solved.image_prompt: A close-up of an ancient magical amulet glowing with runes, intricate designs, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8k, soft ambient light

forest_clearing.text: You arrive at a serene clearing where a tranquil pond reflects the starry night sky.
forest_clearing.image_prompt: A tranquil forest clearing with a crystal-clear pond reflecting a sky filled with stars and galaxies, ethereal glow, ultra-high detail, 8k resolution, breathtaking beauty, by Ivan Aivazovsky

forest_edge.text: Walking along the edge, you find an old map carved into a stone.
forest_edge.image_prompt: An ancient stone tablet with a map etched into it, moss-covered, surrounded by forest foliage, high detail, photorealistic, 8k, natural lighting

decipher_map.text: You study the map and it points toward a hidden treasure within the forest.
decipher_map.image_prompt: A close-up of the stone map highlighting a hidden path leading to treasure, intricate engravings, ultra-detailed, 8k, soft sunlight filtering through leaves

treasure_hunt.text: Following the hidden path, you're confronted by a guardian spirit.
treasure_hunt.image_prompt: An ethereal guardian spirit materializing in the forest, glowing aura, otherworldly appearance, ultra-high detail, 8k, dynamic lighting

battle.message: The Guardian Spirit challenges your intentions!

guardian_defeated.text: You have overcome the Guardian Spirit and discovered the hidden treasure.
guardian_defeated.image_prompt: A hidden treasure chest overflowing with ancient gold and jewels, nestled within tree roots, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8k, golden light emanating from within

retreat.text: You decide it's best not to meddle with mystical forces and head back home.
retreat.image_prompt: A silhouette of a traveler walking away from the mysterious forest under a twilight sky, high detail, 8k, melancholic atmosphere
